'''Mi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]] and the daughter of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Arturo]] of [[Orocco]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], she was kidnapped by a small band of criminals led by [[Grintlok]], who demanded ransom in exchange for her release. However, at the same time [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] seized control of Orocco, and all Arturo's wealth was gone overnight. Grintlok hired [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to deliver the princess to their base on [[Raltac III]], but Solo released the princess and intended to return her to her father. On [[Cataalda]], Mi and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were temporarily seized by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] called [[Dust (bounty hunter)|Dust]]. Later, the criminals tracked Solo on Cataalda and were planning to kill him to get to the princess when a criminal boss named [[Raze (criminal)|Raze]] arrived at the place, along with Arturo himself. Mi identified the gang as her captives and Raze promised Arturo he'd deal with them personally. Arturo offered Solo Mi's hand in marriage, but Han already had another princess on his hands, so he chose to refuse the offer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Adventures: Princess Leia and the Royal Ransom]]'' {{1st}}
